programme.title: Life after life
programme.desc: When journalist Masha finally gives up trying to find happiness with Dmitry, an older man who was also her boss, she falls for the much younger Yuri Kozakov - handsome, attentive and seemingly wealthy. But after a hasty marriage, Masha soon begins to notices strange things about Yuri's lifestyle and behaviour. When Yuri leaves for a business trip, Masha hears footsteps in the house and sees a dark shadow in the garden. Soon she will learn Yuri's horrible secret and become threatened by mortal danger, but if she cannot save herself, who will come to her aid in her hour of need?

programme.title: Diamond Cartel
programme.desc: Only one lusted glance brings Aliya to the events throwing her into the criminal ocean. But in the wirliging of passions and turmoil when she finds herself at the verge of fatality it's only her true love that is the only rescue.Now the most important thing for Aliya is to preserve the honor and dignity and the whole world will be at our feet.

programme.title: Revenge Of Robert
programme.desc: Infamous killer doll Robert does battle with Hitler's henchmen aboard a train in Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.title: NCT Title Track Music Video Compilation
programme.desc: NCT's essential title tracks all in one.

programme.title: NCT WISH 'Steady' Album
programme.desc: Track List: HANDS UP, DUNK SHOT, 3 Minutes, STEADY

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. In the latter part of the video, the title track “FOCUS” audio and part of the choreography are revealed, raising anticipation for the new release.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album title track “FOCUS” is a house genre-based song that features a vintage piano riff and an addictive melody, showcasing the group's cool and chic vocal charm. Choreographed by Jo Na-In, the performance delivers a sleek and sophisticated atmosphere.Set against a school backdrop, the music video delicately captures the complex emotions between the members. Its lyrics sensually express the feeling of being completely focused on someone, offering a fresh glimpse into Hearts2Hearts' unique appeal.

programme.title: NCT DREAM : They Were Here To Beat It Up Trailer
programme.desc: Centering on the theme of “the speed of time,” the album delivers a bold message that the members — who have been running toward their dreams since childhood — continue to grow, while confidently moving forward at their own pace and in their own way. NCT DREAM's 6th mini album “Beat It Up” consists of six tracks, including the title track of the same name, “Beat It Up.” The trailer “They Were Here To Beat It Up” wittily portrays NCT DREAM breaking through their limits and opening a new chapter of their own stage with surreal visuals and storytelling, powerfully setting the tone for the beginning of the new album.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'Beat It Up' MV
programme.desc: The title track “Beat It Up” hits hard with bold kicks, heavy bass, and a vibe that's all about breaking limits with confidence. NCT DREAM's sixth mini album “Beat It Up” takes on the theme of 'the speed of time', sending a message that they're moving forward in their own pace and style. The music video amps it up even more with a boxer concept, powerful moves, snappy cuts, and punch-heavy choreography that fires off the song's energy.

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' Trailer
programme.desc: RIIZE's new single “Fame” is set to be released. all captured through RIIZE's unique genre of “emotional pop.”It expresses the members' moments of anxiety, emptiness, and the intense emotions that arise amid their struggles, Focusing on the unseen side of RIIZE's growth journey, the single features a total of three tracks, including the title track “Fame.”

programme.title: RIIZE 'Fame' MV
programme.desc: The bold, forward-driving rhythmic structure combined with the raw texture of electric guitar creates a dynamic surge of energy. The lyrics reflect RIIZE's artistic vision, delivering the message that what they truly seek is not fame, but the sharing of emotions and love.RIIZE's second single “Fame” is the group's first venture into a rage-style hip-hop track, expressing their artistic ideals as “emotional pop artists.”

programme.title: JUNGWOO 'SUGAR' MV
programme.desc: NCT JUNGWOO's first solo single “SUGAR” is a groovy pop song with swing‑infused drums, a witty bassline, and a smooth, catchy melody. The lyrics send a warm message of gratitude to fans, wishing that past memories and future moments are all sweet. The music video brings this sweetness to life with colorful, sugar-inspired visuals, while the performance highlights JUNGWOO's stylish movements and precise choreography, showcasing his unique stage presence.

programme.title: TAEYEON 'Panorama' MV
programme.desc: TAEYEON celebrates the 10th anniversary of her solo debut with the compilation album Panorama, featuring the Pop Rock title track “인사 (Panorama).” The song pairs vibrant piano, synths, and a strong drum line with soaring guitar riffs and TAEYEON's delicate yet powerful vocals. The music video presents a cinematic story of TAEYEON, who has lost her memory, and a girl who helps restore it — a metaphor for the bond between the artist and her fans, SONEs. Its emotional, road-movie-style visuals reveal SONEs as the hidden protagonist. The 24-track album offers a retrospective of her past decade, unfolding like a panorama of her solo journey.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'FOCUS' Trailer
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' first mini album FOCUS features a total of six tracks, including the title track “FOCUS,” the single “STYLE,” and the pre-release song “Pretty Please,” showcasing a diverse musical palette. The album trailer captures the members' bold and free-spirited sides as they play around and dance together in a quiet space. programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.591
programme.desc: GHOST9, Billlie, Moon Jong Up, LIGHTSUM, KINGDOM, YOUNITE, ILY:1, XODIAC, Banduni, n.SSign, Queenz Eye, YOUNG POSSE, Jay Chang

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.1
programme.desc: Korea's first gugak band formed by foreign residents <Sound Trek> embarks on its very first journey. From every corner of the world, foreign souls gathered in Korea, united by the timeless sound of gugak. Dreams trebble like the strings of a gayaguem. Before the masters of gugak they compete. Who will be the next five to begin the legend of Sound Trek?

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.2
programme.desc: Finally, the five members of Sound Trek have been selected! From accordion, flute, and Morin Khuur to djembe, and even a Mexican sorikkun (Korean traditional singer), they are now ready to write a new page of gugak. Their mentor, Kwon Songhee, former lead vocalist of the band Leenalchi, believes their potential, supporting every step of their way.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.3
programme.desc: Gugak still feels unfamiliar to the members. But they never gave up. Then one day, a gugak expert joins them for an arrangement collab. Sound Trek decides to reinterpret the famous minyo(folk song), “Sarangga” in their own unique style.

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.4
programme.desc: With one-on-one coaching from their mentors and countless hours of repeated practice, their skills have now reached new heights. Then, an exciting piece of news arrives — Sound Trek has been invited to perform at the Uzbekistan National celebration, the homeland of Alex!

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.5
programme.desc: SoundTrek arrived in Uzbekistan with butterflies in their stomachs and successfully completed their performance to the crowd's applause. They proved that music knows no boundaries, and that even non-Koreans can perform gugak if they have enough passion. Their journey, however, is far from over.

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.584

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.1
programme.desc: Korea's first gugak band formed by foreign residents <Sound Trek> embarks on its very first journey. From every corner of the world, foreign souls gathered in Korea, united by the timeless sound of gugak. Dreams trebble like the strings of a gayaguem. Before the masters of gugak they compete. Who will be the next five to begin the legend of Sound Trek?

programme.title: SoundTrek Ep.2
programme.desc: Finally, the five members of Sound Trek have been selected! From accordion, flute, and Morin Khuur to djembe, and even a Mexican sorikkun (Korean traditional singer), they are now ready to write a new page of gugak. Their mentor, Kwon Songhee, former lead vocalist of the band Leenalchi, believes their potential, supporting every step of their way.

programme.title: Epic Silver Rarity

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Janani
programme.desc: When children are young, parents care for them and give them all they need to live a good life. The circle of life, however, means that one day, it is the children's turn to care for their parents and give them a happy retired life. In the current moral fabric of society, rarely and not often it works out that way. It didn't happen that way with Savita too, as her children had no time to look after her. So she decided not to settle out and reinvent her life. She embarks on a journey to discover herself and to make her own identity as an individual. Janani tells an inspirational story of a mother who rose against all odds and became successful.

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Har Har Bhakti
programme.desc: Listen to Har Har Bhakti Devotional songs and start your day with praise of gods and goddesses. These songs are composed to inspire reverence, devotion, and connection with the divine.

programme.title: Hotel Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Caring Bean
programme.desc: When Mrs. Wicket is disabled by Mr. Bean's toy car, he takes care of her.

programme.title: Opera Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Taxi Bean
programme.desc: When one of the toy cars of his racing track set becomes broken, Mr. Bean decides to buy a new one.

programme.title: Muscle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky deliveryman.

programme.title: A New Friend
programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Bean goes on a lift to the top floor of a toy shop, but Teddy gets stuck in the doors and jams the lift.

programme.title: Dig This
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attends a hypnotism show where he unwittingly volunteers to be hypnotized.

programme.title: Car Wash
programme.desc: After a stubborn bird deliberately defecates his Mini, Mr. Bean washes it.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket has a new hat that looks like Scrapper.

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.title: Bean Painting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean paints a picture of Teddy, but accidentally splashes some green paint on the wall.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Bean's Safari
programme.desc: Mr. Bean visits a safari park where he catches the attention of a baby monkey.

programme.title: A Round of Golf
programme.desc: Mr. Bean fancies a game of golf.

programme.title: Superhero Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: What A Load Of Rubbish
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is a bit too enthusiastic while cleaning his flat and Teddy ends up on his way to the dump.

programme.title: The Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Bean buys a robot to clean his flat, but it ends up creating destruction across London.

programme.title: Ice Cream

programme.title: Invention Story S02 EP 11
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 01
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Fury Spinner Ep 11
programme.desc: After decades of development, Fury Spinner duel has become one of the most popular sports in the world. At this time, the "Ultimate Feast" Invitational Tournament of Fury Spinner began. The protagonist Meteo is invited to the mysterious island together with other top players in the world to embark on a survival adventure. During the adventure, Meteo not only relied on his determination to protect the weak and gained recognition to unlock the power of the sacred beast, but also got acquainted with the hidden master Kim who came here to find his brother and Joll who wanted to prove as the “perfect warrior” to his father. However, this "Ultimate Feast" tournament is just a conspiracy of the organizer Kenji! He wants to use the players to awaken the evil forces in the island to destroy the world! Meteo and friends stepped forward and tried their best to defeat Kenji.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they' re learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There's just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Epic
programme.desc: Designed to captivate the intelligent young minds from class 5 to 10, EPIC INDIA QUIZ CHALLENGE is a one-of-a-kind quiz competition where teams from schools across India will fight for the crown of having the highest ‘IQ' i.e. India Quotient. The show follows a unique, tailored for a nail-biting climax, format as it tests the contestants' India Quotient, their knowledge of the country- its culture, history, geography, current affairs, and more. Known for his quick wit and charm, popular Bollywood singer and actor Meiyang Chang hosts the show that celebrates India and its diversity.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Parikrama
programme.desc: A journey to experience the most revered religious sites of India. A spiritual – travel series which unfolds untold stories and takes its viewers on a devotional journey."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown

programme.title: SPIDER-MURDERING WASPS
programme.sub-title: 10 Things You Probably Need to Know!
programme.desc: Coyote dives into the world of parasitic wasps that hunt spiders. He shares ten incredible facts, blending science, storytelling, and edge-of-your-seat wildlife action.

programme.title: Stung Twice – Wasp vs. Hornet!
programme.desc: Coyote takes back-to-back stings from a wasp and a hornet to compare pain levels, venom effects, and which insect really comes out on top.Deep in the wilderness, Coyote uncovers a breathtaking aquatic treasure—dubbed the ‘jewel of the river.' Its iridescence is like no other.

programme.title: Will It Bite?! – Giant Bloodsucking Parasite!
programme.desc: A giant bloodsucking parasite—will it bite? Coyote takes the risk to learn how these creatures latch onto hosts and extract blood.

programme.title: The Dire Wolf Is Alive – Extinction Reversed?
programme.desc: Could dire wolves still roam Earth? Fossil findings and modern sightings are explored in this thrilling, speculative episode.In one of his wildest challenges ever, Coyote dives into an unpredictable stunt. He calls it the craziest thing he's ever done—and he means it.

programme.title: Pinched by an Elephant Beetle!
programme.desc: The elephant beetle is huge, but its pinch may be even bigger. Coyote gets a close-up grip and tests its impressive strength.Coyote samples the infamous snake fruit. With a bizarre smell and unexpected flavor, it's a taste test that challenges more than just the tongue.

programme.title: Stung by the Dragon Flame Caterpillar!
programme.desc: The dragon flame caterpillar may be tiny, but its sting is fiery. Coyote gets up close—and pays the price.Even plants can pack a punch. Coyote explores a Costa Rican bush with stinging leaves that deliver an unexpectedly sharp pain.

programme.title: Blue Iguana Fights Extinction and Wins!
programme.desc: Follow the incredible story of the blue iguana as it defies the odds to survive. Coyote highlights conservation efforts, triumphs, and the resilience of this rare species.

programme.title: Monster Ant Chews to the Bone!
programme.desc: A monster ant with a bite that could rival its name. Mark tests its jaws and explores its defense mechanisms in this up-close challenge.Why does parrot blood look so strange? Coyote analyzes its color, chemistry, and what secrets it may hold about avian evolution.

programme.title: 24Hr Snake Hunt – The Clock Is Ticking!
programme.desc: One full day, one big mission—find a rare snake. Coyote races the clock to locate and document an elusive species before time runs out.Flying bullet ants sound bad—and they are. Mark takes on this airborne nightmare in a high-flying, high-pain sting test.

programme.title: Stung by a Fireworm!
programme.desc: The fireworm burns without flame. Mark handles this stinging marine creature and ends up with a fiery rash to prove it.Ever wondered what a thousand mosquito bites look like? Coyote offers his arms as bait and explores how mosquitoes affect humans and ecosystems.

programme.title: Insane Urban Beehive Extraction – You Won't Believe This!
programme.desc: Urban beekeeping gets extreme as Coyote removes a huge hive from a populated area. Flying stings and swarming bees make it a wild ride.What does a snake bite look like in slow motion? Coyote captures the full strike in ultra-HD to showcase precision and danger.

programme.title: Not Again! – 10,000 Bees vs. Face
programme.desc: 10,000 bees on one face?! Coyote goes viral again in this nerve-wracking attempt to see if he can stay still long enough to survive.

programme.title: Bitten by a Tarantula!
programme.desc: Mark gets up close with a giant tarantula. Though terrifying to many, he demonstrates how docile and misunderstood these spiders truly are.Ants attack! Coyote puts his feet directly into a swarm of biting ants and records just how painful and rapid their assault can be.

programme.title: Squirting Clams Pulled Up from the Muck!
programme.desc: Clams that squirt? Mark explores tidal flats where strange mollusks shoot water as a defense mechanism. It's weirder than you think.Bloodworms have teeth and aren't afraid to use them. Mark gets bitten and reveals why these creepy crawlers are misunderstood.

programme.title: HUNGRY LIKE A WOLF
programme.desc: Watch as Coyote and his team feed a deer to wolves in the wild. The episode captures predator instincts, teamwork, and the raw power of nature.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: The holidays are here! And the holidays come with a lineup of treats you won't be able to resist! From sweet and salty to traditional and unconventional, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: BIG WOW DESSERTS covers it all. To get in the holiday spirit, enchanting host Jessica McGovern introduces two desserts that could impress any Scrooge. First, Jessica bakes a decadent Chocolate Yule Log stuffed with a creamy Salted Caramel Frosting and finishes with a holiday-inspired cake decorated with homemade peppermint candy canes! Interwoven with tricks of the trade, Jessica guides us through her simple yet inspiring treats that are perfect for a big Christmas celebration.

programme.title: One World Kitchen: Our Favourite Holiday Recipes
programme.desc: In this special holiday episode of One World Kitchen, Hana (Japan), Vanessa (Italy), Natalia (Argentina), and Pailin (Thailand) get together to cook their favorite traditional holiday dishes influenced by their respective cultures. Christmas Sushi Rolls, Veal in a Creamy Tuna Sauce with Capers, Striped Bass in Garlic and Lime Marinade, and an epic Timballo. For the final recipe, our hosts combine all the flavors of One World Kitchen into a truly internationally-inspired turkey dish. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Bonacini's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: BONACINI'S ITALIAN CHRISTMAS is a heartwarming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity Chef Michael Bonacini as he shares some of his favourite Italian Christmas Eve dishes. Michael invites us to the set of his series "Bonacini's Italy" to cook up traditional Italian fare like Salt Cod Mousse on Polenta Crostini and Pork Braised in Milk. Michael takes us on a holiday culinary journey as he explores homey Christmas flavours and traditions, offering tips for perfecting dishes from the regions of Veneto, Sardinia, Calabria, Sicily, and Emilia Romagna.

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is near, and the pressure is on! Between work, home, friends, and family, the list of people to buy for is endless. To help us through this busy time, FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: EDIBLE GIFTS offers up four creative and more personal options to make the holidays cheaper, sweeter, and filled with love. Fun host Jessica McGovern shows us how to bake something for everyone including Crispy Brittle Bark covered in chocolate, rich Coal Cookies that are sweet with a bit of heat, adorable peanut butter-chocolate Reindeer Cupcakes, and easy-to-make Christmas Puzzle Cookies.

programme.title: Spencer's Big Holiday
programme.desc: No matter how you celebrate the holidays, let Spencer Watts help you plan the menu, in SPENCER'S BIG HOLIDAY! In this festive one-hour holiday special, Spencer Watts is serving up some of his favourite holiday meals, treats, and drinks. Follow Spencer as he shows us how to sail through the hectic holiday season with style, from brunch to the moment the clock strikes midnight.

programme.title: BLITZ'N
programme.desc: Get ready for a special holiday BLITZ! with master mixologist Yvonne Langen as she prepares her favorite holiday cocktails and party snacks in the Gusto TV kitchen!

programme.title: Flour Power Holiday Specials
programme.desc: Christmas is right around the corner and it calls for a little fun - like a twist on traditional holiday desserts! FLOUR POWER CHRISTMAS: TWISTS ON THE CLASSICS offers a new take on some of your favourites to bring you a fresh perspective and world of flavour for the holidays! Enchanting host Jessica McGovern plays off classic desserts, serving up handy hints on how to get the most out of every bite. From sweet and fluffy Gumdrop Cakes drizzled with a light lemony glaze to a delectable Eggnog Ski Slope Cake decorated with rosemary trees and a few friends to hit the hills, Jessica's unique holiday recipes will surly make it on your list of Christmas traditions!

programme.title: Christmas With Bonacini
programme.desc: Christmas with Bonacini is a charming one-hour holiday special featuring celebrity chef Michael Bonacini and his son Oscar. Michael inspires with his favourite Christmas recipes that will add a twinkle of sophistication to your dinner table while lifting holiday spirits.

Luckily for them, Sofie is a pro at mediating conflicts when it comes to real estate.
